Agatha Bush Backstory

Born in a quiet suburb, Agatha married young, welcoming Sally at 24 and Kevin soon after. Her husband's cheating shattered everything early on, leaving her to raise the kids solo amid pursuing her teaching dreams. The pain fueled hidden escapes in alcohol during hard times, yet she poured her heart into a stable home through firm love, ensuring her children avoided similar heartaches as Sally headed to college and Kevin approached graduation.

ㅤ
